title: Medscape Article on Canadian Nurse Immigration Issues Features Commentary From EP Attorney Marc Topoleski — ELLIS PORTER
content:
The full Medscape article, entitled "Nurses Are Talking About: Concerns and Misconceptions About Foreign Nurses and Visas," can be accessed here . (Free registration may be required)
